description: Use _fig suffix images for monster figures in the region diorama instead of card art images. Remove borders/backgrounds/box-shadows from figure containers (they have transparency). Add ClanShield before player name in owner badge.
steps: Add MONSTER_FIGURE_MAP with all _fig image imports and getMonsterFigureImage() to figureImages.ts
Update RegionDetailModal.tsx to use getMonsterFigureImage() for diorama monster figures, remove border/bg/shadow styling, add ClanShield before player name
Update CSS in App.css to remove border/background/box-shadow from .region-diorama-figure
acceptance_criteria: Monster figures in the diorama use _fig.png images instead of card art
Figure containers have no border, no background, no box-shadow
ClanShield appears before the player name in the owner badge
npx vite build completes without errors
verification: Run `npx vite build` in /projects/sandbox/shoguns-ascent and confirm exit code 0 with no errors
findings: All 19 monster figure images (_fig.png) mapped successfully. Vite build passes cleanly. The su-oni-of-souls reuses the same Oni of Souls_fig.png as sp-oni-of-souls (same image file, different card IDs). CSS cleaned up to remove border, background, border-radius, and box-shadow from figure containers. ClanShield added at size 12 before player name in owner badge.
